'''''Borus''''' was a modified [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] that was in the service of the rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].

The frigate launched an attack on a loyalist research station in a failed attempt to disrupt and take over the [[Vorknkx Project]]. The target was the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Vorknkx]]'', which was testing a cloaking device Zaarin desperately wanted to get his hands on. The ''Borus'' launched advanced [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], several of which were shielded. They proceeded to attack the ''Vorknkx'' and [[SCT Scout craft|SCT Scout Craft]] [[Sentry (scout craft)|''Sentry'']] 1 and 2, who were laying mines. Unfortunately for Zaarin, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] attacked the ''Borus'' with a [[Missile Boat]], destroying the starship and repelling the enemy attack on the Vorknkx Project.

==Behind the scenes==
In the game TIE Fighter, the frigate is called Z-Borus to remind the player that the ship is under the command of Zaarin.
